title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Japan’s Ruling Party Pushes On-Chain Finance Plan to Protect Yen
summary: Stablecoins and tokenized deposits could help Japan modernize payments and reduce reliance on foreign rails, the proposal says.

title: Bitget Wallet integrates Kraken-backed xStocks tokenized equities
summary: The self-custodial wallet platform integrated Kraken-backed xStocks infrastructure, adding more than 130 tokenized stocks and ETFs for users.

title: Stilta raises $10.5M from a16z and YC to help companies rediscover the patents they forgot they had
summary: Stilta announced Tuesday a $10 million seed round led by Andreessen Horowitz. Other investors in the round include YC and operators from companies like OpenAI, Legora, and Lovable.

title: Morning Minute: SEC Reverses Course on Tokenized Stocks, HYPE Soars
summary: HYPE soared as the SEC opened the door to third-party tokenized stocks. Strategy bought another $2B in BTC, and price still went lower.

title: SEC to make ‘innovation exemption’ for tokenized stock trading: Report
summary: Several SEC officials reportedly didn’t support the decision, while tokenization platform Securitize flagged risks with enabling third-party platforms to issue tokenized stocks.

title: OSHA probing worker death at SpaceX’s Starbase site
summary: The death is the latest worker safety issue at the Starbase facility, which has a higher injury rate than all other SpaceX sites.

title: Lawyers Apologize After Fake Claude-Generated Quotes Appear in Trump Layoffs Case
summary: Attorneys representing a former Homeland Security official admitted using Anthropic’s Claude Console to help draft a court filing that included fabricated quotes.

title: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
summary: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries developers use to interact with APIs.

title: Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion AI Lawsuit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman
summary: The legal battle between Elon Musk and OpenAI has ended in a win for the company he co-founded, following a jury decision.

title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

title: Bank of England, FCA Set Out ‘Shared Vision’ for Tokenization
summary: The UK’s central bank and financial regulator have launched a joint Call for Input as tokenization moves from “pilots to production.”

title: Hyperliquid Defies Market Downturn as SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI IPOs Loom
summary: Hyperliquid’s HYPE token has jumped as its HIP-3 pre-IPO perp marketplace heats up ahead of a series of high-profile tech IPOs.

title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
summary: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

title: Starlink Mobile challengers back proposed telco-led D2D joint venture
summary: TAMPA, Fla. — A planned direct-to-device (D2D) joint venture between AT&T, T-Mobile and Verizon has divided operators behind the satellites needed to connect ordinary smartphones from space.
